--- title: "Welcome to the Blog" author: 'Pan-African Updates' date: "2023-01-07" categories: [update] title-block-banner: true image: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1626695436755-3e288720849c?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=MnwxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1171&q=80 --- This is the first post. Here on the Pan-African Updates, we put forth ideas critical to building the AfroSphere[^1]. [^1]: The cultural, political, and economic congregation of Africans and people of African decent ::: column-margin ![](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1626695436755-3e288720849c?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=MnwxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1171&q=80) ::: Welcome!
